EmailTemplate.name: GC 2
EmailTemplate.subject: Please Contact Us for a Policy Update
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Further to our previous email, unfortunately, payment for your insurance cover remains outstanding.
If we do not receive the outstanding payment before [insert date here] unfortunately we will have to cancel down your policy from inception. It will be your responsibility to get in contact with us before this date if you still require the policy.
Please accept this as your 30 days’ notice, as per our terms and conditions, of your policy being cancelled due to non-payment.
Please contact us immediately so we can process a payment and ensure your cover remains in place.
You can call us directly on 01242 808740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
